queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with lacking a checking account and its contribution to increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how a critical or other existing credit history functions as a mitigating credit risk driver in default probability.
Empirical analysis of the determinants of default related to extended loan duration in months and its contribution to elevated credit risk.
